buildCommand: prisma generate && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && next build

DATABASE_URL.description: Supabase Connection Pooler URL (port 6543) - Get from: https://supabase.com/dashboard → Settings → Database

DIRECT_URL.description: Supabase Direct Connection URL (port 5432) - Get from: https://supabase.com/dashboard → Settings → Database

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase Service Role Key (secret - server only!)
